input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.8.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.8.2.4
            TITLE: a minimum of two full threads must project from any lock nut.

            rule T.8.2.4: A minimum of two full threads must project from any lock nut.
T.8.2.4 A minimum of two full threads must project from any lock nut.

final_answer: A minimum of two full threads must project from any lock nut.
